data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding preference and consent visibility per channel/purpose.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of preference and consent visibility per channel/purpose. However, the evidence provided does not include specific checks or confirmations regarding the visibility of preferences and consents across different channels or purposes. The prior steps focus on various operational aspects but do not address this specific requirement, indicating a lack of sufficient evidence to make a definitive assessment.
gaps: Lack of evidence confirming preference and consent visibility per channel/purpose.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the preference and consent visibility requirement.
